api/client/go.purpose: Generated Go SDK for the OpenMeter v1 REST API. client.gen.go is fully generated by oapi-codegen from api/openapi.cloud.yaml; client.go adds ergonomic wrappers and auth helpers on top of the generated client.

patterns.name: Never edit client.gen.go
patterns.description: client.gen.go carries a 'Code generated by oapi-codegen DO NOT EDIT' header and is regenerated by 'go generate' (//go:generate go tool github.com/oapi-codegen/oapi-codegen/v2/cmd/oapi-codegen --config=codegen.yaml ../../openapi.cloud.yaml in client.go). Any manual edit is overwritten on next gen-api run.
patterns.example:
// BAD: editing client.gen.go directly
// GOOD: add wrapper to client.go

patterns.name: Ergonomic wrappers live in client.go only
patterns.description: client.go is the only hand-written Go file. It extends *Client and *ClientWithResponses with convenience methods (NewAuthClientWithResponses, IngestEvent, IngestEventBatch, IngestEventWithResponse, IngestEventBatchWithResponse) that delegate to the verbose generated method names.

patterns.name: Auth injected via RequestEditorFn
patterns.description: NewAuthClientWithResponses and NewAuthClient prepend a WithRequestEditorFn option that sets the Authorization: Bearer header, then append any caller-supplied opts. Never embed auth logic inside generated code.

patterns.name: Tests use httptest.NewServer mock server
patterns.description: client_test.go validates each wrapper by spinning up an httptest.Server, asserting on method, path, and Content-Type, and comparing JSON-decoded response structs with assert.Equal from testify.

patterns.name: Enum types carry a Valid() method
patterns.description: Generated enums (e.g. AddonStatus, AppType) have a Valid() bool switch that covers all known constants and returns false for unknown values. Use Valid() for runtime validation instead of manual switch statements.

key_file_guides.role: Fully generated SDK: all types, enums, request/response structs, and HTTP methods. Source of truth is api/openapi.cloud.yaml via codegen.yaml.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not edit. Regenerate with 'make gen-api'. Generated with always-prefix-enum-values and disable-required-readonly-as-pointer compatibility flags.

key_file_guides.role: Hand-written ergonomic layer: auth constructors and CloudEvents ingest shorthands. The //go:generate directive here drives regeneration of client.gen.go.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Only add methods that delegate to generated methods. Do not duplicate type definitions or business logic here.

key_file_guides.role: oapi-codegen configuration: package name 'openmeter', generates client + models + embedded-spec, output to client.gen.go, with always-prefix-enum-values enabled.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Changing compatibility flags here affects all generated enum constant names and pointer semantics across the SDK. Coordinate with api/openapi.cloud.yaml changes.

key_file_guides.role: Unit tests for hand-written wrappers using mock HTTP servers. Tests are in package openmeter (white-box).
key_file_guides.watch_for: TetsListEvents has a typo in the function name (missing 't') — it is never run by 'go test'. Do not replicate this pattern.

key_file_guides.role: ErrResponse struct for rendering HTTP error responses. Minimal — StatusCode, StatusText, AppCode, Message fields.
key_file_guides.watch_for: This is separate from the generated error types in client.gen.go. Ensure new error handling uses the correct type for the context.

anti_patterns: Editing client.gen.go manually — it is overwritten on every 'make gen-api' run
Adding new API types or request/response structs to client.go — they belong in api/spec/ TypeSpec and regenerated into client.gen.go
Embedding authentication tokens or credentials directly in client methods instead of using the ClientOption / RequestEditorFn pattern
Importing app-internal packages (beyond openmeter/pkg/models which client.gen.go already imports) — this is a public SDK and must remain externally importable without the full monorepo
Bypassing the generated *ClientWithResponses wrapper and writing raw HTTP calls in tests

decisions.decision: client.gen.go is generated from api/openapi.cloud.yaml (not openapi.yaml) using codegen.yaml with always-prefix-enum-values
decisions.rationale: The cloud variant includes cloud-specific endpoints. Enum prefixing prevents collisions when multiple enums share value strings (e.g. 'active' appears in AddonStatus, AppStatus, etc.).

decisions.decision: Ergonomic wrappers in client.go rather than changing codegen.yaml templates
decisions.rationale: CloudEvents ingest has two content-types (single vs batch) that produce verbose generated method names; short wrappers (IngestEventWithResponse, IngestEventBatchWithResponse) improve DX without forking the generator.

code_examples.scenario: Add a new ergonomic wrapper for a generated method

api/client/node.purpose: Tombstone folder documenting that the Node SDK has been superseded by the JavaScript SDK at api/client/javascript. Contains only a README redirect; no active code lives here.

key_file_guides.role: Single-file redirect pointing developers to api/client/javascript.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not add new files here. Any Node/TypeScript SDK work belongs in api/client/javascript.

anti_patterns: Adding new SDK code to this folder — it is deprecated in favour of api/client/javascript

api/client/web.purpose: Tombstone folder documenting that the Web SDK has been superseded by the fetch-based JavaScript SDK at api/client/javascript. Contains only a README redirect; no active code lives here.

key_file_guides.role: Single-file redirect pointing developers to api/client/javascript.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not add new files here. Any browser/web SDK work belongs in api/client/javascript.

anti_patterns: Adding new SDK code to this folder — it is deprecated in favour of api/client/javascript
